$comment: Single source of truth for kun engine metadata. Prose/docs reference this file instead of hardcoding numbers. /health (.claude/scripts/health.sh) reads it and warns when docs or reality drift from these values. Agent frontmatter uses a model alias (`opus`/`sonnet`/`haiku` per `model_tiers`) — never pin a version number there.

model_tiers.$comment: Per-agent model alias by task type. The portable stack fleet (~/.claude/agents) follows this; the project fleet defaults to opus (quality-over-speed) except purely mechanical agents.
model_tiers.opus: architecture, orchestration, deep reasoning, code review/fixes, and strategy/leadership agents
model_tiers.sonnet: standard build agents + the mechanical project agent (package)
model_tiers.haiku: routine/formatting agents (comment, git, icon, github, semantic, sse, structure)
